/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -DNDEBUG   CMakeFiles/test_pipeline.dir/tests/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeline_modules.dir/src/audio/audio_io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeline_modules.dir/src/chunker/chunker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeline_modules.dir/src/gate/features.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeline_modules.dir/src/gate/gate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeline_modules.dir/src/scene/scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeline_modules.dir/src/scene/adaptive.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeline_modules.dir/src/logging/logger.cpp.o  -o test_pipeline  -lm -pthread
